revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Taxobox colour scheme]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Taxobox colour scheme]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: added Harosa as per talk page request

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value. See talk page. Tested in sandbox and on testcases page, and in dark mode.
1 revision imported: overwriting
